completion: Grabowski can discover, inspect, and freshness-check rLens bundles through typed read-only tools.
Bureau can bind rLens context references into task/run/receipt evidence.
Follow-up context-pack, Cabinet import, and Vibe-Lab measurement tasks are represented explicitly.
goal: Integrate rLens as a task-profiled evidence backbone for agent and repository work without turning it into a control plane or truth oracle.
title: rLens agent ecosystem integration
